nodes.name: Black-and-yellow grosbeak
nodes.summary: The black-and-yellow grosbeak (Mycerobas icterioides) is a species of finch native to the northern parts of the Indian subcontinent, primarily the lower and middle Himalayas. It is in the family Fringillidae. The species ranges across Afghanistan, India, Nepal and Pakistan where its natural habitat is temperate forests. Gallery References

nodes.name: Black-and-yellow grosbeak
nodes.summary: Black-and-yellow grosbeak（Mycerobas icterioides）是图谱中的分类级分类节点，当前关联1种鸟类，如Black-and-yellow grosbeak。

nodes.name: Mycerobas
nodes.summary: Mycerobas（Mycerobas）是图谱中的分类级分类节点，当前关联4种鸟类，如Black-and-yellow grosbeak、黑翅拟蜡嘴雀、斑翅拟蜡嘴雀等4种鸟类。
